rediger.title: Edit tour
rediger.lede: Update the details for this tour. Changes are saved when you press "Save changes".
rediger.accessDenied: You can only edit tours you created.
rediger.deleteConfirmBody: This cannot be undone. All dates, registrations and associated data will be removed.

page.title: Create tour
page.lede: Register a new tour with trails and any cabins along the way. Tour leaders can also set up dates for group tours.
page.mustLogin: You must be logged in to create a tour.
page.trailsHelp: Search and click to select. The order follows the click order.
page.trailsNone: No trails are registered in the database yet.
page.cabinsHelp: Optional. Shows cabins within {{radius}} km of the chosen trails. The order follows the click order.
page.cabinsNone: No cabins are registered in the database yet.
page.cabinsNeedTrail: Choose a trail first, or check "Show all cabins".
page.errorAuth: You must be logged in to create a tour.
page.errorDateRequired: Each date must have both a start and an end.
page.errorDateRange: End date must be after start date.
page.errorFrist: Early registration deadline must be before the start date.
page.typeHelp: Choose whether this is a group tour you lead, or a self-guided tour others can do on their own.
page.typeFellesturHelp: You are the tour leader, set dates, and others can sign up.
page.typeSelvgaendeHelp: Inspirational tour with no dates or sign-ups.
page.datesHelp: Add one or more dates when the tour will run. More dates can be added later from «My tours» as a tour leader.
page.dateFristHelp: Once this deadline passes, registrations become binding.

draw.title: Draw new trail
draw.helpText: Click on the map to add points along the trail.
draw.errorPoints: Click on the map to add at least two points.
draw.errorGpxNoPoints: The GPX file contains no valid points.
draw.errorGpxParse: Could not read the GPX file.

form.gearPlaceholder: Hiking boots, Rain jacket, Water bottle
form.imageAutoHint: If you choose «automatic», the tour gets an image automatically based on its id.
form.errorDistanceNumber: Distance must be a valid number.
form.errorElevationNumber: Elevation must be a valid number.
form.errorDurationNumber: Duration must be a valid number.
form.errorDistancePositive: Distance must be greater than 0 km.
form.errorDurationPositive: Duration must be greater than 0 hours.
